_instructions: 1. Add the 'firecrawl-mcp' block to your existing Claude Desktop / Claude Code MCP config
4. After adding, restart Claude Desktop or reload Claude Code
5. Verify the MCP is active by asking Claude: 'List your available MCP tools'
_available_mcp_tools: firecrawl_scrape         — Scrape a single URL → markdown/HTML/screenshot
firecrawl_crawl          — Crawl entire site → structured content
firecrawl_map            — Discover all URLs on a domain
firecrawl_extract        — AI-powered structured data extraction with schema
firecrawl_search         — Web search with content extraction
firecrawl_check_crawl_status — Check status of async crawl jobs
firecrawl_get_crawl_data — Retrieve results from completed crawl
